features: Pack of 40 Birthday Goody Bags: You would got 40PCS medium gift bags with handle in 4 different vibrant patterns, 10PCS for each pattern. Enough bags for Child’s party in classroom, good value for the money.

Pretty Thicken Aluminum Films bags: The kids party bags are made of thick aluminum films with beautiful cartoon design, which will bring more cheerful atmosphere in party, both girls and boys would love them.

Bearing Capacity Up To 1.5lbs：These birthday thank you gift bags have strong bearing capacity, can hold up to 1.5lbs. It’s sturdy enough to fill with party favors, goodies, little bday toys, candy, treats or snacks.
Perfect Size to Fit Lots of Stuffers: The size of the cute gift bag set is 9.77*6.61 inch, roomy enough for little party return favors and convenient for children to carry to school.
Great for Party Giveaway: The unique loot bags not just for baby, infants, toddlers, children and teens but also apply to adults including men and women.
